name: prototype-open-museum
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; if ! command -v quarto >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL -o /tmp/quarto.deb https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-cli/releases/latest/download/quarto-linux-amd64.deb; sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y /tmp/quarto.deb; rm -f /tmp/quarto.deb; fi; python -m pip install --upgrade pip; pip install -r requirements.txt'
